expectations.text: Uses setVisible(true/false) on the dc_overrideprice control
Retrieves the quote statecode via Xrm.WebApi or fetch, not by reading a form field directly
expectations.evidence: Uses fetch to /api/data/v9.2/quotes(${relatedQuoteId})?$select=statecode — correct API retrieval

expectations.text: Code is added inside the NavcoQuoteLineSdk IIFE, not as a global function
expectations.evidence: showHideOverridePriceByQuoteState is a private function inside the IIFE and called from formOnLoad inside the same IIFE

expectations.text: Guards against null/empty quoteid before calling .getValue()[0]
expectations.evidence: if (!quoteAttr || !quoteAttr.getValue() || quoteAttr.getValue().length === 0) return; — full null guard including length check
